rows.subject: fix: harden steering and storage utility contracts

invariant_binary.note: The RouterOSController.get_rule_status diff only adds an isinstance(item, dict) guard and preserves the enabled/disabled boolean return path for matching mangle-rule records.

invariant_new_only.note: The inspected diff touches parsed rule-status handling and SteeringDaemon.measure_current_rtt source validation only; it does not alter mangle rule matching, connection marks, or any existing-flow rerouting behavior.

invariant_autorate_baseline.note: The SteeringDaemon.measure_current_rtt diff narrows accepted current RTT values from autorate health and autorate IRTT to numeric values, while BaselineLoader.load_baseline_rtt remains the unchanged authority for baseline RTT.
